name: Panhandle Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees F.
2. Generously grease a 12-cup bundt or 9-inch tube pan and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, combine cornmeal and baking powder. Stir in cheddar.
4. In a medium bowl, beat eggs, oil, sour cream, corn, and chopped green chiles together.
5. Add the egg mixture to the cornmeal mixture. Stir until just moistened.
6. Spoon the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 40 to 50 minutes in the preheated oven or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Cool on a rack for 10 minutes, then invert onto a serving plate.
